attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
SXMLII.GLOBAL_NAME,
SXMLII.TRANSMISSION_DATE,
SXMLII.SHIP_DATE,
SXMLII.CREATION_DATE,
SXMLII.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
SXMLII.GES_UPDATE_DATE,
SXMLII.REQUEST_ID,
SXMLII.CREATED_BY,
SXMLII.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
SXMLII.ATTRIBUTE1,
SXMLII.ATTRIBUTE2,
SXMLII.ATTRIBUTE3,
SXMLII.ATTRIBUTE4,
SXMLII.ATTRIBUTE5,
SXMLII.ATTRIBUTE6,
SXMLII.ATTRIBUTE7,
SXMLII.ATTRIBUTE8,
SXMLII.ATTRIBUTE9,
SXMLII.ATTRIBUTE10,
SXMLII.ATTRIBUTE11,
SXMLII.ATTRIBUTE12,
SXMLII.ATTRIBUTE13,
SXMLII.ATTRIBUTE14,
SXMLII.ATTRIBUTE15,
SXMLII.MESSAGE_ID,
SXMLII.ITEM_REVISION,
SXMLII.UOM,
SXMLII.ATTRIBUTE_CONTEXT,
SXMLII.HOLDING_UNIT_ID,
SXMLII.PO_LINE_NUMBER,
SXMLII.ITEM_NUMBER,
SXMLII.PRODUCT_QUANTITY,
SXMLII.RETURN_REASON_CODE,
SXMLII.RETURN_INSTRUCTION,
SXMLII.PROCESS_STATUS,
SXMLII.BATCH_ID,
SXMLII.CREATE_DATETIME,
SXMLII.ACTION_CODE,
'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_CG1_X_MK_3C9_LN_IB_IFACE SXMLII
WHERE
NOT EXISTS (
			SELECT 1 
			FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
			WHERE SXMLII.GLOBAL_NAME=NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
		   ) OR
NOT EXISTS (
			SELECT 1
			FROM $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_RTRN_ITMS_RCPT_CONFIRMATION NRIRC
			WHERE SXMLII.MESSAGE_ID = NRIRC.SK_MESSAGE_ID 			
		   )  OR
NOT EXISTS (
			SELECT 1
			FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SHIPMENT_CARTON NSC             
			WHERE SXMLII.HOLDING_UNIT_ID = NSC.BK_CARTON_ID
		   )

SELECT
NSC.BK_CARTON_ID  AS BK_CARTON_ID,
NRIRC.PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM AS PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM,
COALESCE(SXMLII.CREATION_DATE,DATE '3500-01-01') AS  CREATE_DT,
CASE SXMLII.PROCESS_STATUS WHEN 'C' THEN 'COMPLETED'WHEN 'N' THEN 'NEW' WHEN 'E' THEN 'ERROR' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END  AS PROCESS_STATUS_CD,
COALESCE(SXMLII.TRANSMISSION_DATE,DATE '3500-01-01') AS  TRANSMISSION_DT, 
NRIRC.RTRN_ITMS_RCPT_CNFRMTN_KEY AS RTRN_ITMS_RCPT_CNFRMTN_KEY,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
(CASE WHEN NRISRC.BK_CARTON_ID IS NOT NULL AND NRISRC.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM IS NOT NULL  THEN 'U' ELSE 'I' END) AS DML_TYPE 
FROM
(
SELECT
SXMLI.CREATION_DATE,
SXMLI.PROCESS_STATUS,
SXMLI.TRANSMISSION_DATE,
SXMLI.GLOBAL_NAME,
SXMLI.MESSAGE_ID,
SXMLI.HOLDING_UNIT_ID
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_CG1_X_MK_3C9_LN_IB_IFACE SXMLI
UNION ALL
SELECT
EXMLII.CREATION_DATE,
EXMLII.PROCESS_STATUS,
EXMLII.TRANSMISSION_DATE,
EXMLII.GLOBAL_NAME,
EXMLII.MESSAGE_ID,
EXMLII.HOLDING_UNIT_ID
FROM 
$$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_X_MK_3C9_LN_IB_IFACE EXMLII)SXMLII
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
	ON SXMLII.GLOBAL_NAME=NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME 
INNER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_RTRN_ITMS_RCPT_CONFIRMATION NRIRC
	ON SXMLII.MESSAGE_ID = NRIRC.SK_MESSAGE_ID 
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SHIPMENT_CARTON NSC             
	ON SXMLII.HOLDING_UNIT_ID = NSC.BK_CARTON_ID              
LEFT JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_RTRN_ITMS_SHPMT_RCPT_CNFRMTN NRISRC
	ON NSC.BK_CARTON_ID = NRISRC.BK_CARTON_ID
	AND NRIRC.PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM=NRISRC.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM
